name: Hello Dollies
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Eagle Brand Sweet Condensed Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Melt butter in a 13x9 inch dish.
3. Layer the vanilla wafers, pecans, coconut, butterscotch pieces, and semi-sweet chocolate pieces evenly over the melted butter.
4. Pour Eagle Brand sweet condensed milk evenly over the top of the layered ingredients.
5. Bake for 25-30 minutes.
6. Allow to cool for one hour.
7. Cut into 2x2 squares.
8. Store in the refrigerator.
